_comment: Event blackout dates. When 'today + 1 day' (next trading day) is in nfp_dates, the NFP entry gate blocks new entries. Source: BLS empsit schedule (https://www.bls.gov/schedule/news_release/empsit.htm). Quarterly cron job re-verifies against BLS when reachable.
_verified: 2026-05-21 (instruction-file dates per Carlos approval; BLS WebFetch returned 403)
